title: Lake Geneva Wisconsin Police and Fire Commission meeting recordings

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Wisconsin Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

---

To the Custodian of Records,

Pursuant to the Wisconsin Open Records Law, Wis. Stat. §§ 19.31–19.39, I request copies of the **audio recordings of the last five (5) meetings** of the City of Lake Geneva Police and Fire Commission, as of April 23, 2026.

If any of these recordings are maintained in digital format, I request that they be provided in their native electronic format (e.g., MP3, WAV, or similar) via email, file transfer, or other electronic means.

If audio recordings are not available for any of these meetings, please provide:

1. A written explanation stating whether such recordings were created, and
2. If created but no longer available, the reason for their absence (e.g., deletion, retention policy, or other disposition), and
3. Any existing records that serve as substitutes (such as minutes, transcripts, or notes).

If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption(s) relied upon and provide the reasons for withholding the record(s), as required by law.

I request a waiver of any fees on the grounds that this request is in the public interest. If fees are expected to exceed $25, please inform me before fulfilling the request.

As required by Wis. Stat. § 19.35(4)(a), I look forward to your response as soon as practicable and without delay.

Please confirm receipt of this request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Gary Milliette
